_doc: TEMPLATE — the ingestion contract between the source DB and this pipeline. Replace the column names on the RIGHT of `fields` with the real source columns, then set `table`, the cursor columns and `lead_id`. This file is configuration (reviewed like lender config), never code: when the source schema changes, only this file changes. Keys beginning with '_' are ignored by the loader.

cursor._doc: The (created_at, id) tuple the watermark advances on. created_at MUST be monotonic-ish; id is the total-order tiebreak. If rows are UPDATEd after creation, point created_at_column at an updated_at column instead.

lead_id._doc: The stable per-lead identity. `column` is the source column; `prefix` is prepended to form the job_id. Must be unique and stable across re-reads.

fields._doc: canonical_pipeline_field -> source_column. `image` is the document URL column; the pipeline also scans other columns as a fallback. Unlisted canonical fields are simply absent.

validate._doc: Beyond presence: `amount_numeric` requires payment_amount to parse as a number; `date_parseable` requires payment_date to parse as a date. Failures are quarantined, never fed to the pipeline.
